raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> at with XXXX credit card called CITI charge to XXXX XXXX XXXX and I was out of town for work in Florida. I told the representative and I was never credited for the charge of {$700.00}. 
XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  I was charged XXXX and I was out of town for that charge as well {$100.00} CITI changes my credit limit whenever they feel like it for things on my credit which are inaccurate. When I call and write to report that I have called the bureaus to correct my credit report it is never resolved. I have a person problem with being charged for purchases that the agreement with the store policies state that I would not be charged for things I did not purchase. They can roll the camera footage at the store and see I was not at the location at the time of the purchases.
